summary: Iteration 113 - User Reported Issues Testing Complete. All 16 backend tests passed (100%). ROOT CAUSE IDENTIFIED AND FIXED: OnboardingTour component overlay (z-[250]) was blocking all clicks on dashboard. FIX APPLIED: Added onClick={finish} to backdrop div in OnboardingTour.js - users can now click outside modal to dismiss. Backend APIs work correctly - workspaces load, admin panel accessible, billing fields correct.

ui_bugs.issue: Overlay with z-[250] and bg-black/70 blocks ALL pointer events on dashboard. Users cannot click workspace cards, Admin Panel link, or any other element until tour is dismissed.

action_items: FIXED: OnboardingTour backdrop now has onClick={finish} to dismiss tour by clicking outside
Consider adding a more visible 'Skip Tour' button
Consider not showing tour for returning users who already have workspaces
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: OnboardingTour.js line 34 - Added onClick={finish} to backdrop div to allow dismissing by clicking outside
The tour only checks localStorage 'nexus_tour_seen' - if user clears localStorage or uses incognito, tour shows again (expected behavior)
Backend APIs all work correctly - issue was purely frontend UI blocking
context_for_next_testing_agent: User reported 'workspaces don't load' and 'admin panel is gone'. ROOT CAUSE FOUND AND FIXED: OnboardingTour component at /app/frontend/src/components/OnboardingTour.js had a fixed overlay (z-[250]) that blocked ALL clicks on the dashboard. FIX APPLIED: Added onClick={finish} to backdrop div on line 34 - users can now click outside the modal to dismiss it. All functionality verified working: workspaces load (100 found), Admin Panel visible and clickable, workspace pages load with channels. Backend APIs all return 200 with correct data.
